authShell.title: Kindergarten and family in one place.
authShell.description: Messages, daily reports, albums, meals, and attendance management for teachers, parents, and directors.
authShell.imageAlt: Uzbek parent, teacher, and kindergarten director

login.title: Sign in to Kichkintoy
login.description: Sign in to see kindergarten, class, and child updates.
login.centerHelpText: Your director can send an invitation link, or you can register and request access by kindergarten name.

dashboardHome.centerDescription: Messages, attendance, and daily reports for {{center}} are managed here.
dashboardHome.activeDescription: Your account is active. All sections open after kindergarten approval.
dashboardHome.albumDirectorDesc: Review today's photos and class moments.
dashboardHome.albumTeacherDesc: Share photos and short notes with parents.
dashboardHome.dailyReportTeacherDesc: Write sleep, mood, and activity updates.
dashboardHome.noticesTeacherDesc: Send class updates from one place.

parentHome.todaySub: Your child’s day, all in one place
parentHome.caughtUp: New updates will appear here as they happen.
parentHome.noChildrenBody: Once your child is added to a center, their day will show up here.

report.title: Today’s report is ready
report.empty: Open the report to see the full day.
report.none: No daily report for today yet

aside.attendanceCaption: Days attended this month, out of days recorded so far.

calendar.emptyBody: Records for this month will appear here.
calendar.note: Attendance is shown after the center records it. Excused absences for illness or emergencies count as attendance.

pending.title: Awaiting director approval
pending.description: Your request to join {{center}} was sent. We will notify you here and by SMS as soon as it is approved.
pending.name: Name

signup.phoneDescription: We will send a one-time code to your phone.
signup.codeHelper: Enter the code we sent by SMS.
signup.codeSent: Verification code sent. Check your SMS.

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.birthFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
errors.searchMinLength: Enter at least 2 characters of the kindergarten name.
errors.regionDistrictRequired: Choose a region and district first.
errors.pickOrCreate: Pick an existing kindergarten or create a new one.

signup.credentialsDescription: You will use these to sign in next time.
signup.roleDescription: Pick how you will use Kichkintoy.
signup.parentDesc: Follow your child's day and message the center.
signup.teacherDesc: Post reports, photos, and notices for your class.
signup.directorDesc: Manage your kindergarten, staff, and parents.
signup.childDescription: We will create a profile for your child at {{center}}.
signup.relationshipDescription: Pick the relationship you'd like teachers to see.
signup.centerDescription: Pick your region and district, then search by name.
signup.directCenterCode: I have a direct center code instead
signup.noCentersFound: No kindergartens found in this district. Ask your director to send you an invitation.
signup.classTitle: Which class is your child in?
signup.classDescription: Pick the class at {{center}}. The director can change it later if needed.
signup.noClassesYet: This center has no classes yet. Choose "I don't know yet" and the director will assign one.
signup.dontKnowDesc: The director will pick the class when approving.
signup.directorSetupDescription: Search for your kindergarten. If it doesn't exist yet, create it.
signup.noCentersMatch: No kindergartens match. You can create a new one below.
signup.cantFindCreate: Can't find your kindergarten? Create a new one
signup.claimExistingInfo: You will request to join {{center}} as a director. An existing director must approve.
signup.name: Name
